opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Destroyed couch looks brand new for $47 — no replacement needed
opportunities.before_state: Faded, pet-hair-covered, stained fabric sofa that looks 10 years old
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, wrinkle-free couch that looks freshly bought
opportunities.why_now: Summer hosting season + pet shedding peak drives sofa protection searches to yearly highs in May–June.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia over-sink dish drying rack with utensil holder
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaotic kitchen counter cleared in 10 minutes for $38
opportunities.before_state: Cluttered countertop with drying dishes, scattered utensils, no clear workspace
opportunities.after_state: Open counter space, dishes organized above sink, clean minimalist kitchen aesthetic
opportunities.why_now: Kitchen organization content dominates Reels saves in May as people prep for summer entertaining.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper cooling pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Waking up with neck pain every day → gone after one $69 swap
opportunities.before_state: Flat, yellowed pillow causing neck stiffness and poor sleep every morning
opportunities.after_state: Supportive, cool, ergonomic pillow with zero morning neck pain
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness searches spike in late May as people adjust routines heading into summer; pain-point angle drives high conversion.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece outdoor sectional sofa set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Bare concrete patio transformed into a lounge for $299
opportunities.before_state: Empty, unused patio with cracked concrete and zero seating
opportunities.after_state: Styled outdoor living room with cushioned sectional, ready for summer gatherings
opportunities.why_now: Memorial Day weekend just passed and patio season is in full swing — outdoor furniture purchase intent peaks late May through June.

opportunities.specific_product: Stackable closet shelf dividers and velvet hangers bundle
opportunities.transformation_hook: Exploding closet fully organized in 20 minutes for $32
opportunities.before_state: Overstuffed closet with falling clothes, tangled hangers, unusable floor space
opportunities.after_state: Color-sorted, neatly stacked wardrobe with doubled hanging capacity and visible floor
opportunities.why_now: Post-spring-cleaning momentum carries into late May; closet organization Reels consistently rank among highest-saved home content.
